title: Politics in Contemporary India
further_info: Recommended Reading Christophe Jaffrelot. 2003. India’s Silent Revolution: The Rise of the Lower Castes in North India. Hurst ––––. 2023. Modi's India: Hindu Nationalism and the Rise of Ethnic Democracy. Princeton University Press. Francine Frankel. 2005. India’s Political Economy, 1947-2004: The Gradual Revolution, Delhi: OUP. Mukherji, Rahul (ed.). 2011. India’s Economic Transition: The Politics of Reforms. Oxford: New Delhi. Sumit Ganguly and Rahul Mukherji. 2011. India since 1980. Cambridge University Press Sunil Khilnani. 2017 (1997). The Idea of India, 20th Anniversary Edition, Farrar Straus and Giroux, London Stuart Corbridge, John Harris and Craig Jeffery. 2013. India Today: Economy, Politics and Society. Cambridge, UK.: Polity Press Partha Chatterjee, 2026. For a Just Republic: The People of India and the State. Columbia University Press.
